programs.desc: Beavis and Butt-head join Captain Dick Jackman on his Sunday morning program, "rapping" about their problems.

programs.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programs.desc: A fool and his nachos are soon parted... by a rat? When a rat takes up residence in Beavis and Butt-head's kitchen, they'll stop at nothing until the kitchen at Burger World has one too.

programs.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programs.desc: Beavis and Butt-head help a pair of movers locate the cool stuff at Stewart's house. But were they really movers?

programs.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programs.desc: A suggestive commercial convinces Beavis & Butt-head it's time to try frozen yogurt.

programs.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programs.desc: As the Vampire craze hits Beavis and Butt-head's high school, the two try to join the broody undead to score chicks. But when they confuse a hirsute homeless man for a werewolf, it's a case of once bitten, twice infected with Hep-C.

programs.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programs.desc: While Beavis and Butt-head doze off on the couch, waiting for the TV signal to come back, a flurry of excitement and violence happens outside.
